item_text: user -> admin — type=message; label="login"; explanation="user sends login message to admin"
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-user-001 title: user logs in successfully module: user source pages: 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8 preconditions: user has a valid username and password. test data: - username: testuser - password: testpassword test steps: 1. user enters the username and password in the login form. 2. user clicks the login button. 3. server validates the credentials. 4. server sends a response to the user. expected result: user is logged in successfully and redirected to the home page.

item_text: user -> product — type=message; label="view"; explanation="user sends view message to product"
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-user-003 title: user views a product module: user source pages: 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8 preconditions: user is logged in and there is a product available. test data: - product name: t-shirt test steps: 1. user navigates to the product page. 2. user clicks on the "view" button for the t-shirt. 3. server queries the database for the product details. 4. server sends the product details to the user. expected result: user receives the product details and can view them.

item_text: user -> cart — type=message; label="add"; explanation="user sends add message to cart"
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-user-004 title: user adds a product to the cart module: user source pages: 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8 preconditions: user is logged in and there is a product available. test data: - product name: t-shirt test steps: 1. user navigates to the product page. 2. user clicks on the "add to cart" button for the t-shirt. 3. server adds the product to the user's cart. 4. server sends a confirmation message to the user. expected result: product is added to the user's cart and a confirmation message is displayed.

item_text: user -> checkout — type=message; label="checkout"; explanation="user sends checkout message to checkout"
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-user-006 title: user checks out from the cart module: user source pages: 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8 preconditions: user is logged in and there are items in the cart. test data: - cart contains one t-shirt test steps: 1. user navigates to the checkout page. 2. user clicks the "checkout" button. 3. server processes the checkout request. 4. server sends a confirmation message to the user. expected result: user is redirected to the payment page and a confirmation message is displayed.

item_text: admin -> product — type=message; label="add"; explanation="admin sends add message to product"
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-admin-003 title: admin adds a product to the database module: admin source pages: 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8 preconditions: admin is logged in. test data: - product name: new product - product description: this is a new product test steps: 1. admin navigates to the product management page. 2. admin clicks the "add product" button. 3. admin enters the product name and description. 4. admin clicks the "submit" button. 5. server adds the product to the database. 6. server sends a confirmation message to the admin. expected result: product is added to the database and a confirmation message is displayed.
